verses.1: Be merciful to me, God, be merciful to me,
verses.2: I cry out to God Most High,
verses.3: He will send from heaven, and save me,
verses.5: Be exalted, God, above the heavens!
verses.6: They have prepared a net for my steps.
verses.8: Wake up, my glory! Wake up, lute and harp!
verses.9: I will give thanks to you, Lord, among the peoples.
verses.10: For your great loving kindness reaches to the heavens,
verses.11: Be exalted, God, above the heavens.
